text.title: Puppeteer Stealth & Proxy Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the puppeteer-stealth-proxy methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-stance
step.action: Choose plugin / manual / none. Document at top of worker file in a 3-line comment.

step.name: build-proxy-pool
step.action: Define small pool (8-16). Health-check each at startup via HEAD; drop unhealthy.

step.name: wire-proxy-auth
step.action: Launch with --proxy-server=http://host (no creds). Call page.authenticate per page.

step.name: retry-with-circuit
step.action: Wrap target calls in retry(max=2, backoff=exp). On persistent 429/403, trip circuit breaker and exit non-zero with status.

step.name: audit-assertions
step.action: Scan for navigator.* asserts that conflict with the stance; remove or gate them.
